title: revert: remove Qwen3.5 — not available on Fireworks serverless
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Pruning the model garden
gist.blurb: We've removed the Qwen3.5 model from our text endpoints to keep your generations fast and reliable while we sort out upstream availability.
gist.summary: Reverted the addition of the Qwen3.5 397B model to resolve generation failures caused by upstream serverless availability issues.
gist.impact: Improves overall text endpoint reliability by removing an unstable model from the registry.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating deprecated code snippets and error logs to clean up the system, while Polly the bee watches happily. Represents removing broken code to improve health.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan nomnom creature happily eating a stack of deprecated API logs and error messages while the cute bee mascot watches amused. A retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.
